name: Cherry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the muffin pans by greasing or lining with paper liners.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the chopped maraschino cherries to the dry ingredients.
4. In another bowl, beat the eggs.
5. Gradually mix in the melted butter and milk until well combined.
6. Pour the wet mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
7. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 375°F (190°C), or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
9. Makes 9-10 large muffins.
